safetyNote: Draft seeding must preserve existing image refs unless an approved replacement asset ref is provided.
transferSafetyRule: Codefy OS never writes to Sanity. It only prepares media outputs.

entries.recommendedVisual: A branded Solutions social card showing enterprise control and operator execution as two connected sides of Tranzkit, sized for 1200x630 sharing.
entries.recommendedPurpose: Social sharing and link preview image for the Solutions page.

alt.en: Tranzkit solutions social card showing enterprise control and operator execution.
alt.ar: بطاقة مشاركة لصفحة الحلول تعرض تحكم الشركة وتنفيذ المشغل.

entries.notes: Current published solutionsPage document has no seo.ogImage. The repo query and MCP inspection indicate this is the only image-capable field in solutionsPage.
entries.sourceTruth: Composite card built from real Tranzkit enterprise-control and operator-execution workflows and the approved Solutions messaging scope.
entries.assetMethodNote: Design this as a Figma social card for launch. It should visually connect enterprise planning and operator execution without inventing a new product surface.

mediaQualityRule.guidance: Tune app state before recreating in Figma. Recreated mockups must stay faithful to real Tranzkit capabilities and approved scope.

mediaLanguagePolicy.currentRule: One image asset in Sanity, bilingual CMS text around it, and bilingual alt text in the media plan.
rules: Use a single shared media asset by default for English and Arabic pages.
Do not create separate English and Arabic images unless the asset contains large embedded text or truly needs RTL-specific layout treatment.
Avoid large English or Arabic text baked into images.
If a Figma frame needs text, keep it minimal and brand-neutral, such as the Tranzkit logo only.
If an asset ever becomes locale_specific_required, do not move it to ready_for_transfer until website-side localized image support or an approved workaround exists.
